name: AES Inverse S-Box
description: The AES decryption byte-substitution step, a gate-level GF(2^8) inverse S-box, adapted from Tiny Tapeout's Apache-2.0 tt08-aes-invsbox (commit e786368), taken spec -> lint -> simulation -> GDS on sky130hd entirely through the platform.
highlights: Full flow to GDSII on sky130hd (OpenROAD/ORFS)
Timing met: WNS 0.0 ns; 540 std cells; 3252 um^2
Self-checking testbench (all 256 bytes vs FIPS-197) PASSED
source_note: RTL adapted from Tiny Tapeout tt08-aes-invsbox (Apache-2.0, commit e786368); kept as-is except removing keep_hierarchy so the flow flattens; original self-checking TB; authored by dogfooding SiliconCrew locally.
